heroSection.title: Natural Latex Mattresses
heroSection.subtitle: Kerala Organic Latex Labs
heroSection.description: Experience the therapeutic comfort of our GOLS-certified natural latex mattresses. Engineered in Kerala for the perfect balance of support and cloud-like softness.

featuresGrid.title: GOLS Certified Organic
featuresGrid.description: 100% pure GOLS-certified natural latex from smallholder Kerala rubber farms

featuresGrid.title: Dunlop Process
featuresGrid.description: Century-old technique preserving natural cellular structure for unmatched resilience

featuresGrid.title: Factory-Direct Pricing
featuresGrid.description: Zero middleman markup — save up to 60% over retail showroom prices

featuresGrid.title: Oeko-Tex Certified
featuresGrid.description: All fabric covers tested against 350+ harmful substances. Safe for infants

featuresGrid.title: 10-Year Warranty
featuresGrid.description: Industry-leading 10-year full structural warranty, no fine-print strings

ownershipWays.sectionTitle: Two Ways to Own a RelaxPro
ownershipWays.sectionSubtitle: Direct from our factory or custom-built to your exact specifications

customBuilder.title: Build Your Own Mattress
customBuilder.description: Choose your exact size, thickness, and layer configuration — we manufacture it to order. Get a WhatsApp quote in minutes with our guided 2-step builder.

shopPrebuilt.title: Shop Pre-Built Mattresses
shopPrebuilt.description: Explore our curated collection of 12 handcrafted latex and hybrid mattresses — from value entry to 10" luxury pure latex, each backed by a 10-year warranty.

shopByBrands.sectionSubtitle: Find your perfect comfort from three expertly crafted collections

bestsellersSection.sectionSubtitle: Our most-loved models, chosen by families across South India

costComparison.sectionSubtitle: Natural latex is an investment — and here is why it pays for itself
costComparison.footnote: Over 15 years, a RelaxPro latex mattress costs less per year than replacing cheap foam three times.

showroomCtaBanner.title: Visit Our Showroom
showroomCtaBanner.address: Jeedimetla Industrial Area, Phase 3, Near Prasad Labs, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500055

whyChooseUs.sectionSubtitle: What makes Kerala-made natural latex the smarter choice for your sleep

benefits.title: GOLS-Certified Organic
benefits.description: Every latex core carries GOLS seal. No synthetic fillers, no chemical stabilizers — just pure tapped sap from Kerala farms.

benefits.title: Built to Last 15 Years
benefits.description: Natural Dunlop latex has no foam memory. It rebounds fully every time, retaining density and support for 12–15 years.

benefits.title: Factory-Direct Pricing
benefits.description: Bypass retail markups entirely. Manufactured and sold direct from our Jeedimetla factory at honest prices.

benefits.title: Orthopedic Tested
benefits.description: Recommended by physiotherapists across South India for chronic back pain, sciatica, and posture correction.

benefits.title: OEKO-TEX Certified Fabric
benefits.description: All quilted covers tested to Standard 100 — safe for infants, elders, and allergy-sensitive sleepers.

benefits.title: Free Delivery & Setup
benefits.description: Free shipping and white-glove delivery across Telangana, AP, and Karnataka. Expands fully within 48 hrs.

allShowroomsSection.sectionDescription: Experience the RelaxPro difference in person. Our sleep consultants are ready to help you find your perfect mattress.

faqSection.sectionDescription: Everything you need to know about natural latex and our mattresses.

bookingForm.successMessage: Thanks! We will confirm your appointment within 30 minutes.

diagnosticForm.title: Free Sleep Diagnostic Consultation
diagnosticForm.successMessage: Suresh will personally review your concern and call you back within 2 hours.

seo.metaTitle: RelaxPro | Premium Natural Latex Mattresses — Factory Direct
seo.metaDescription: Shop GOLS-certified natural latex mattresses crafted in Kerala. 12 models from ₹9,500 with free delivery across South India. 10-year warranty.
